name: editvcs
description: Universal version control for creative editing — for agents and humans (Premiere Offline)

scripts.verify: npm run verify:repository && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.editvcs:build:packages: npm --workspace packages/shared-types run build && npm --workspace packages/core run build && npm --workspace packages/diff-engine run build && npm --workspace packages/storage run build && npm --workspace packages/host-adapters run build
scripts.editvcs:build: npm --workspace packages/shared-types run build && npm --workspace packages/core run build && npm --workspace packages/diff-engine run build && npm --workspace packages/storage run build && npm --workspace packages/host-adapters run build && npm --workspace apps/companion-service run build && npm --workspace apps/premiere-panel run build && npm --workspace apps/premiere-plugin run build
